## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/Repo maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"`
- [ ] `python -m wi_system.cli --root . lint`
- [ ] I reviewed docs and examples for accuracy

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
